headline: Philip Morris (PM): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: Philip Morris has generally followed the market’s trajectory over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 5.1% to $174.72 per share while the S&P 500 was flat.

headline: A Look At Philip Morris International (PM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Cooldown
summary: Context for Philip Morris International (PM) After Recent Price Moves Philip Morris International (PM) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a roughly flat 1 day move, a small gain over the past week, a loss over the past month, and positive returns across longer periods. At a last close of US$174.78 and a market value of about US$271.9b, the stock sits alongside annual revenue of US$40.6b and net income of US$11.3b. This provides investors with a large, globally diversified tobacco...

headline: Philip Morris International U.S. to Launch New Business Solutions Center, Creating 180 Jobs in Tampa Bay Area
summary: Today, Philip Morris International's U.S. businesses ("PMI U.S.") announced an investment of approximately $50 million in a new Business Solutions Center in Tampa, Florida. The Center will create approximately 180 direct and indirect high-skilled jobs and represents a pivotal expansion of PMI U.S. operations, consolidating key functions—business solutions, distribution operations, and customer service—into a single hub. This investment is designed to enhance operational efficiency across these f

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Philip Morris, Lam Research, Goldman Sachs, Palladyne and Eastern
summary: Philip Morris gains on smoke-free momentum, while Lam Research and Goldman Sachs ride tech strength and strategic shifts to fuel growth.

headline: Philip Morris International's U.S. Businesses Announces Investment Of ~$50M In New Business Solutions Center In Tampa, Florida
summary: New business hub will advance U.S. operations and support company's mission to deliver a smoke-free America by moving legal-age adults who smoke to better alternativesSTAMFORD, Conn., March 17, 2026 /PRNewswire/
